description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests that runs on every push to main and on pull requests. Use a matrix strategy to test on ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, and windows-latest with Python 3.7, 3.8, 3.9, 3.10, and pypy-3.8. Check out the repository, run base setup actions, install dependencies, list installed packages, check the manifest, and run tests with coverage on supported environments.
